items.name_en: Upgraded Triomphe Canvas Crossbody. New quality photos as shown, really good quality, just snap and shoot, the texture is undeniable ͏
items.name_cn:
Upgraded Triomphe Canvas Crossbody. New quality photos as shown, really good quality, just snap and shoot, the texture is undeniable ͏
I have a special fondness for this brand, whether it's the old or new styles, I really like them~ Great for styling, very spacious. Daily items like lipstick, compact powder, wallet, and phone all fit.
size:20*10*4

items.name_en: Upgraded Triomphe Full Leather Series. New quality photos as shown, really good quality, just snap and shoot, the texture is undeniable ͏
items.name_cn:
Upgraded Triomphe Full Leather Series. New quality photos as shown, really good quality, just snap and shoot, the texture is undeniable ͏
I have a special fondness for this brand, whether it's the old or new styles, I really like them~ Smooth calfskin, the texture is truly so high-end. Carrying it feels like carrying an Hermès (perfect for a little humblebrag). Besides solid colors, there's also the Triomphe canvas series, really hard to choose. I decided to ALL IN, you can learn from me. Great for styling, very spacious. Daily items like lipstick, compact powder, wallet, and phone all fit.
size:20*10*4
Search Style No.: 194143

items.name_en: Upgraded Version ⚠️ M83532 Light Blue Denim Chain Shoulder Bag. The Liv Pochette re-adopts bleached and stonewashed Monogram denim, featuring a vintage look and a summer vibe. This small bag is designed to sit comfortably under the arm, equipped with a detachable gold metal chain and a detachable, adjustable aged natural leather strap. It is signed with a Louis Vuitton-engraved plaque. Size: 24.5 x 13.5 x 6.5 cm.

items.name_en: Upgraded version with chip hardware~2022 New Color Light Grey
items.name_cn:
Upgraded version with chip hardware~2022 New Color Light Grey
Ohanel 19 Handbag
As an important number for Chanel, "19" continues the brand's classic naming method, representing the year it was born, 2019, just like the 2.55 bag launched by Mademoiselle Chanel in February 1955❗️
Clutch with Flap Small Light Grey ZP Leather Fully in stock!!
Light and soft texture of lamb leather combined with the large quilted design element
Three carrying ways: Crossbody, Shoulder, Handheld
Chain mix: Vintage Gold, Vintage Silver, Bright Silver
Small Size:16x26x9cm(Image shows)

items.name_en: Upgraded Version, Exclusive High-Quality Replica, Black
items.name_cn:
Upgraded Version, Exclusive High-Quality Replica, Black
Di0r Ultra-matte 🖤 SO BLACK
A dark-themed Diana bag
The hardware chain and handle are all textured matte black.
The all-black color scheme is versatile and elegant.
Perfect for daily commuting paired with a capable work outfit.
At the same time, the bag is not just low-key; it is also very versatile.
Pair it with cargo pants to transform into a dark style.
If you get tired of the all-black look, add a silk scarf to make it more romantic.
The leather is calfskin.
Compared to the sheepskin version, it is less prone to deformation and scratches.
Simply wipe it down after use.
It is a luxury bag that is not high-maintenance.
Size: 17cm

items.name_cn:
Upgraded Version!!!
Top Grade✨【SIDE TRUNK Medium Handbag】M14046 White Multicolour (Takashi Murakami)
This Side Trunk Sj medium handbag infuses the playful Monogram pattern with the dynamic style of the Takashi Murakami edition series, incorporating soft calfskin with reinforced metal corners and the iconic S-lock.
It easily accommodates daily needs. The square silhouette pays homage to the brand's classic trunks, with removable stud handles and shoulder straps for flexible carrying.
Dimensions: 23.5x16x8.5cm

specs.rawTitle:
Upgraded Version!!!
Top Grade✨【SIDE TRUNK Medium Handbag】M14046 White Multicolour (Takashi Murakami)
This Side Trunk Sj medium handbag infuses the playful Monogram pattern with the dynamic style of the Takashi Murakami edition series, incorporating soft calfskin with reinforced metal corners and the iconic S-lock.
It easily accommodates daily needs. The square silhouette pays homage to the brand's classic trunks, with removable stud handles and shoulder straps for flexible carrying.
Dimensions: 23.5x16x8.5cm
